description_long: This object consists of two similarly shaped cups, each with a rounded body, a wide open mouth, and a single curved handle attached to the side. One cup is intact, while the other is visibly broken, with large jagged cracks and missing pieces along the rim, giving it a damaged appearance. Both cups have a smooth, matte surface and a uniform muted greenish-gray color. The handles are robust and ergonomically shaped for gripping. The interior of each cup is hollow, suitable for holding liquids or small items. There are no visible decorative patterns, branding, or text on the exterior surfaces.
description: A pair of matte greenish-gray cups, one intact and one with a broken rim, both featuring curved handles and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cups side by side, with the broken cup's jagged rim and the intact cup's smooth rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded backs of both cups and the absence of handles from this angle.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the handles of both cups and the broken rim of one cup from a different perspective.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backs of the cups and the broken rim's profile.
